character.name: Ranger
character.prompt: A top-down, slightly isometric pixel art sprite of a "Ranger" enemy for a 2D survivor-style game. The character is a "Forest Stalker"—a tall, slender thin figure wearing a tattered green hooded cloak and leather bracers. The Ranger is mid-animation, holding a glowing ethereal bow made of green energy. One arm is pulled back as if drawing an arrow. 32x32 pixel scale. High contrast, clean outlines, dark fantasy aesthetic, matching the art style of a blue-robed pixel art Mage.
